description_long: This is an ornate, vintage corded telephone featuring a rotary dial with intricate gold detailing and a robust, metallic base. The handset is connected to the main body by a thick, coiled cord and rests on a decorative cradle supported by two brass arms. The base is constructed from dark metal with elaborate engravings and four sturdy, curved legs, giving it a substantial and elegant appearance. A large, spoked rotary dial is prominently displayed on the front, surrounded by a circular brass plate. The side of the phone features a mechanical crank, hinting at its early 20th-century design. The overall finish is a mix of aged brass, black metal, and subtle patina, evoking a sense of historical craftsmanship.
description: A vintage rotary dial corded phone with ornate brass and black metal details, a coiled cord, and a decorative cradle. The design is robust, elegant, and reminiscent of early 20th-century telephones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rotary dial, ornate brass detailing, and the handset resting on the cradle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mechanical crank and the spoked wheel, with the handset seen end-on.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cradle, the coiled cord, and the structural details of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the coiled cord and the back of the handset, with less visibility of the rotary dial.
